community.proxmox.proxmox.short_description: Management of instances in Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox.description: Allows you to create/delete/stop instances in Proxmox VE cluster. The module automatically detects containerization type (lxc for PVE 4, openvz for older).

hostname.description: The instance hostname. Required only for O(state=present). Must be unique if vmid is not passed.

ostemplate.description: The template for VM creating. Required only for O(state=present).

disk.description: This option was previously described as

community.proxmox.proxmox_access_acl.short_description: Manages ACLs on the Proxmox PVE cluster

community.proxmox.proxmox_backup_info.short_description: Retrieve information on Proxmox scheduled backups
community.proxmox.proxmox_backup_info.description: Retrieve information such as backup times, VM name, VM ID, mode, backup type, and backup schedule using the Proxmox Server API.

community.proxmox.proxmox_cluster_ha_gro.short_description: Management of HA groups in Proxmox VE Cluster

community.proxmox.proxmox_cluster_ha_res.short_description: Management of HA groups in Proxmox VE Cluster

community.proxmox.proxmox_cluster_join_i.short_description: Retrieve the join information of the Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox_cluster_join_i.description: Retrieve the join information of the Proxmox VE cluster.

community.proxmox.proxmox_cluster_status.short_description: Retrieve Proxmox VE cluster status information
community.proxmox.proxmox_cluster_status.description: Retrieve status information about the Proxmox VE cluster. Returns information about both the cluster itself and the nodes within it.

community.proxmox.proxmox_disk.short_description: Management of a disk of a Qemu(KVM) VM in a Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox_disk.description: Allows you to perform some supported operations on a disk in Qemu(KVM) Virtual Machines in a Proxmox VE cluster.

community.proxmox.proxmox_group.short_description: Group management for Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox_group.description: Create or delete a user group for Proxmox VE clusters.

community.proxmox.proxmox_kvm.short_description: Management of Qemu(KVM) Virtual Machines in Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox_kvm.description: Allows you to create/delete/stop Qemu(KVM) Virtual Machines in Proxmox VE cluster.

community.proxmox.proxmox_nic.short_description: Management of a NIC of a Qemu(KVM) VM in a Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox_nic.description: Allows you to create/update/delete a NIC on Qemu(KVM) Virtual Machines in a Proxmox VE cluster.

community.proxmox.proxmox_node_info.short_description: Retrieve information about one or more Proxmox VE nodes
community.proxmox.proxmox_node_info.description: Retrieve information about one or more Proxmox VE nodes.

community.proxmox.proxmox_node_network_i.short_description: Retrieve information about Proxmox VE node network interfaces

community.proxmox.proxmox_pool.short_description: Pool management for Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox_pool.description: Create or delete a pool for Proxmox VE clusters. For pool members management please consult M(community.proxmox.proxmox_pool_member) module.

community.proxmox.proxmox_pool_member.short_description: Add or delete members from Proxmox VE cluster pools
community.proxmox.proxmox_pool_member.description: Create or delete a pool member in Proxmox VE clusters.

community.proxmox.proxmox_role.short_description: Role management for Proxmox VE cluster

community.proxmox.proxmox_sendkey.short_description: Send key presses to a Proxmox VM console
community.proxmox.proxmox_sendkey.description: Uses the Proxmox API to send a sequence of key presses to the console of a VM. Keys can be specified explicitly or derived from a plain text string.

community.proxmox.proxmox_snap_info.short_description: Snapshot management of instances in Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox_snap_info.description: Allows you to list snapshots from instances in Proxmox VE cluster. Supports both KVM and LXC, OpenVZ has not been tested, as it is no longer supported on Proxmox VE.

vmid.description: The instance ID. If not set, will be fetched from PromoxAPI based on the hostname.

snapname.description: Name of the snapshot that has to be listed.

community.proxmox.proxmox_tasks_info.short_description: Retrieve information about one or more Proxmox VE tasks
community.proxmox.proxmox_tasks_info.description: Retrieve information about one or more Proxmox VE tasks.

community.proxmox.proxmox_template.short_description: Management of OS templates in Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox_template.description: Allows you to upload/delete templates in Proxmox VE cluster.

node.description: Proxmox VE node on which to operate.

src.description: Path to uploaded file. Exactly one of O(src) or O(url) is required for O(state=present).

url.description: URL to file to download. Exactly one of O(src) or O(url) is required for O(state=present).

template.description: The template name. Required for O(state=absent) to delete a template. Required for O(state=present) to download an appliance container template (pveam).

content_type.description: Content type of the template. Valid values are V(vztmpl) for LXC container templates, V(iso) for ISO disc images, and V(import) for harddisk images and Open Virtual Appliances (OVA).

community.proxmox.proxmox_user.short_description: User management for Proxmox VE cluster
community.proxmox.proxmox_user.description: Create or delete a user for Proxmox VE clusters.

community.proxmox.proxmox_vm_info.short_description: Retrieve information about one or more Proxmox VE virtual machines
community.proxmox.proxmox_vm_info.description: Retrieve information about one or more Proxmox VE virtual machines.

community.proxmox.proxmox_vnet.short_description: Manage virtual networks in Proxmox SDN.

community.proxmox.proxmox_vnet_info.short_description: Retrieve information about one or more Proxmox VE SDN vnets.
